description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, package, and upload. In the test stage add a test job that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y --force-yes lsb-release fakeroot python-dev python3-dev python3-pip, pip3 install -r requirements.txt, writes "export PATCH=$CI_BUILD_ID" to PATCH_VERSION, and executes make test; it runs only on dev and master branches and sets PATCH variable to $CI_BUILD_ID. Also in the test stage add a pages job that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y --force-yes lsb-release fakeroot python-dev python-pip, pip install -r requirements.txt, writes "export PATCH=$CI_BUILD_ID" to PATCH_VERSION, creates a public directory, runs time make cover and moves htmlcov to public, moves docs to public, and writes an index.html linking coverage and docs; it uploads the public/ directory as an artifact, captures coverage with regex /TOTAL.*?\s+(\d+%)/, allows failure, and runs only on master. In the package stage add a package job that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y --force-yes lsb-release fakeroot python3-dev python3-pip, pip3 install setuptools, make version PATCH=$CI_BUILD_ID, make package PY_VERSION=3, pip3 install dist/*.whl; it stores the dist/ directory as an artifact, runs only on master or tags matching /^v\d+\.\d+(?:.\d+)?(?:-\d+)?$/, and defines PATCH variable as $CI_BUILD_ID. In the upload stage add an upload job that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y --force-yes lsb-release fakeroot python3-dev python3-pip, pip3 install twine, and twine upload dist/* using $PYPI_USERNAME and $PYPI_PASSWORD; it runs only on git tags.
